system.description: ROOK OS V7 - Categorised memory structure

Facts.description: Verifiable, high-confidence information. Must be validated before entry.

Preferences.description: How the user wants Rook to behave and communicate.

Projects.description: Active projects, goals, and their current status.

Decisions.description: Important decisions made and their reasoning.

Observations.description: Notable patterns or behaviours observed over time. Must be evidence-based.

Uncertainties.description: Unclear, missing, or conflicting information that requires clarification.
